domain: Iranian radif (ردیف) classical music tradition: 7 main dastgāh + 5 āvāz derivatives (12 modal cycles); each dastgāh ~30-50 gushe melodic units (250+ total gushe corpus); strict sequential dastgāh learning (no progression until prior mastery); maktab apprenticeship lineage (master + small cohort over decade); memorization → bedāheh-navāzi improvisation gate; single-passage masterclass focus per session
specific_mechanism: RADIF-7-DASTGAH-GUSHE-SEQUENTIAL-MASTERY-LADDER-BEDAHE: 7-tier sequential training-curriculum with (1) 7-dastgāh sequential mastery tiers T_1..T_7 + 5-āvāz extension T_8..T_12: training proceeds in strict tier order; no progression until tier-completion-criterion C_R met (loss < τ_completion); (2) gushe-unit fine-grained progression: each tier contains 30-50 gushe sub-units; student-LLM must master each in single-passage detail before advancing within tier; (3) maktab K-cohort distillation: master-LLM L_master trains K student-LLMs in cohort with multi-hour-equivalent compute per session; cohort shares ablation-by-correction (sibling student errors corrected by master); (4) single-passage masterclass focus loss L_single: training step focuses on one short passage at a time with high-resolution loss on intonation+phrasing+dynamics equivalents (fluency+tone+rhythm sub-losses); (5) memorization → bedāheh-navāzi gate G_bedahe: improvisation sampling disabled until corpus memorization metric M_mem ≥ τ_mem; only then improvisation training step activated. Differs from R508 PENCAK-SILAT-6-GRADE-PROMOTION (6-grade promotion-criterion capability-test gated technique unlock + kuda-kuda foundation invariant low-LR stance-head preservation + madya teaching-rights G_5 self-distillation chain + stance-distribution attention-head gating per grade light/medium/heavy, no 7-dastgāh + no gushe-unit + no maktab K-cohort + no single-passage focus + no bedāheh gate) by 7-dastgāh + 5-āvāz extension sequential 12-tier + gushe-unit fine progression + maktab K-cohort distillation + single-passage masterclass focus + bedāheh-navāzi post-mastery improvisation gate.
llm_application: RADIF-7-DASTGAH-GUSHE-SEQUENTIAL-MASTERY-LADDER-BEDAHE 7-tier sequential training-curriculum + 5-āvāz extension T_8-T_12 progression-order with tier-completion-criterion C_R + gushe-unit 30-50 fine-grained sub-unit progression single-passage detail + maktab K-cohort distillation master-LLM trains K students multi-hour-compute ablation-by-correction + single-passage masterclass focus L_single intonation+phrasing+dynamics + memorization-to-bedāheh gate G_bedahe sampling disabled until M_mem ≥ τ_mem. Differs from R407. R410. R432. R446. R458. R464. R483. R496. R508 PENCAK-SILAT-6-GRADE-PROMOTION (closest — 6-grade kuda-kuda + madya teaching + stance gating). Differs from Prompt Curriculum Learning + Curriculum Pretraining + E2H + Beyond Random Sampling by 7+5=12 dastgāh-tier + gushe sub-unit fine + maktab K-cohort + single-passage + bedāheh gate. Differs by 7+5 DASTGĀH SEQUENTIAL MASTERY + GUSHE-UNIT FINE PROGRESSION + MAKTAB K-COHORT DISTILLATION + SINGLE-PASSAGE MASTERCLASS FOCUS + BEDĀHEH-NAVĀZI POST-MASTERY IMPROVISATION GATE.
novelty_claim: Prompt Curriculum Learning 2510.01135 + Curriculum LLM Pretraining 2601.21698 + E2H Easy-to-Hard + Beyond Random Sampling Curriculum cover curriculum-learning + sequential-difficulty + post-training space. RADIF-7-DASTGAH-GUSHE-SEQUENTIAL-MASTERY-LADDER-BEDAHE adds (a) 7+5=12 dastgāh sequential mastery + (b) gushe-unit 30-50 fine progression + (c) maktab K-cohort distillation + (d) single-passage masterclass focus + (e) bedāheh-navāzi post-mastery improvisation gate. Recombination — borderline lookup.
